review_comment:
Based on some [recent bugs](https://github.com/domaindrivendev/Swashbuckle.AspNetCore/issues?q=is%3Aissue+defaultvalue+is%3Aopen+created%3A%3E2024-05-01+) we've had in Swashbuckle, you might want to add some test cases for:

- `[DefaultValue(null)] int? id`
- `[DefaultValue(2)] int? id`
- `[DefaultValue(null)] string? id`
- `[DefaultValue("foo")] string? id`
- `[DefaultValue(null)] TaskStatus? status`
- `[DefaultValue(TaskStatus.Canceled)] TaskStatus? status`
Great list! Thank you for sharing. I'll add these. I suspect that `[DefaultValue(null)]` will be interesting to sus out.
